list.vod_name: 权欲第三章第五季
list.vod_sub: 少年卡南,权欲第三章之少年卡南第5季
list.vod_actor: 内详
list.vod_content: 《权欲第三章之少年卡南》不仅讲述了卡南斯塔克的童年故事，而且还将是一部庞大的家庭剧，讲述那些抚养他的人、以及他年少时期认识的人的故事。该剧发生在90年代纽约皇后区南牙买加社区。本剧开场时，卡南只有15岁,但他对毒品交易世界并不陌生。因为，他的母亲Raq是纽约市毒品交易市场上崭露头角的可卡因分销商。
list.vod_play_url: 第01集$https://player.yzzyvip-35.com/20260704/10296_6439f181/index.m3u8#第02集$https://player.yzzyvip-35.com/20260704/10295_3e53ca3d/index.m3u8#第03集$https://player.yzzyvip-35.com/20260704/10294_90968598/index.m3u8#第04集$https://player.yzzyvip-35.com/20260704/10293_37f2fc94/index.m3u8

list.vod_actor: 伊格纳西·利斯
list.vod_content: Filip 是一个年轻、不负责任且厚颜无耻的男同性恋者，坚信世界尽在掌握。当家庭悲剧降临，他的自我中心转变成挥之不去的负罪感。在照顾年幼的侄女时，Filip 渴望保持自由，但由于童年创伤，他抗拒将侄女托付给陌生人。为了照顾她，他必须直面自己的软弱、失败和社会偏见。

list.vod_name: 达顿牧场第一季
list.vod_sub: 黄石宇宙衍生剧/黄石衍生剧/Yellowstone Beth and Rip spinoff series/The Dutton Ranch
list.vod_actor: 凯利·蕾莉,科尔·豪瑟,艾德·哈里斯,安妮特·贝宁,芬恩·利特,胡安·巴勃罗·拉瓦,杰·科特尼,J.R.维拉利尔,马克·门查卡,娜塔莉·阿琳·林德,约翰·W·希思,爱默生·米勒,凯·卡斯特,布列塔尼·霍夫纳,伊曼·克罗松,拉乌夫·马尔祖基,娜塔莉娅·格温,凯蒂·里普利,凯尔·普罗米斯科
list.vod_director: 克里斯蒂娜·亚历山德拉·沃罗斯,格雷格·艾坦尼斯,杰西卡·洛瑞,菲尔·亚伯拉罕
list.vod_content: 抛开《黄石》时期经历的阴影，Beth和Rip努力共筑未来，但他们遭遇了残酷的新现实，以及一家不择手段、只为保住自己帝国的无情敌对牧场。在南得克萨斯州，血脉之深远胜于一切，宽恕转瞬即逝，而生存的代价，或许正是你的灵魂。

list.vod_content: Billed as a story about love, sex and passion – a reflection of the meaning of life and the relentless passage of time, The Trio follows middle-aged Hugo. When he is approached by the daughter of both of his childhood loves, he is thrown back in time to a moment when his younger self is about to start university and has moved to Stockholm and to stay with the Stiller family. list.vod_content:
In Season 16, it’s a challenge for Ronald “Mac” MacDonald (Rob McElhenney), Charlie Kelly (Charlie Day), Dennis Reynolds (Glenn Howerton), Dee Reynolds (Kaitlin Olson), and Frank Reynolds (Danny DeVito) who yearn for the past as they attempt to survive in 2023.
This year alone, Mac battles with allergies and long-distance dating, Charlie takes on his long-forgotten sisters, Dee...

list.vod_content: Four egocentric friends who meijubar.net run a neighborhood Irish pub in Philadelphia try to find their way through the adult world of work and relationships. Unfortunately, their warped views and precarious judgments often lead them to trouble, creating a myriad of uncomfortable situations that usually only get worse before they get better.

list.vod_content: Four egocentric friends who run a neighborhood Irish pub in Philadelphia try to find their way through the adult world of work and relations hips. Unfortunately, their warped views and precarious judgments often lead them to trouble, creating a myriad of uncomfortable situations that usually only get worse before they get better. Written by DesertShark25
